middleware.description: For POST /api/v1/memberships. When the target athlete is a minor (age < 18): refuses when body.primary_guardian_id is missing OR the referenced AthleteGuardian.status != 'active' OR the guardian's user has not verified their identity (per user module's is_verified check). Adult-athlete memberships (self) bypass. Returns 422 MEMBERSHIP_GUARDIAN_REQUIRED with the required guardian_id + verification-step deep-link in the error payload.
